## Description
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Accessibility improvement

## Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] Follows WCAG 2.2 guidelines
- [ ] Uses large, high-contrast typography (≥ 18pt)
- [ ] Single, large buttons per action
- [ ] No hidden menus or complicated settings
- [ ] Plain language for all text
- [ ] Tested with screen readers
- [ ] Tested with high-contrast mode

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tested on both iOS and Android (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested with senior users (if applicable)

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your changes.

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)

## Additional Notes
Any additional information that reviewers should know.
